case_title: HART SECURITY, LTD. VS. CYBERMDX, INC.

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO ALAMEDA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CYBERMDX, INC.

APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF HART SECURITY, LTD. AS TO DEFENDANT CYBERMDX, INC. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HART SECURITY, LTD. SERVED APR-01-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CYBERMDX, INC. PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON MAY-02-2008 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CYBERMDX, INC.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CYBERMDX, INC.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO MADERA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CYBERMDX, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO MADERA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CYBERMDX, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HART SECURITY, LTD. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CYBERMDX, INC. $352,831.84 PRINCIPAL, $1,889.82 INTEREST, $335.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $355,056.66, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
